caption:
The silence of the late-night lecture hall was broken only by the hum of the projector and the sound of my breathing. I adjusted my blazer, ensuring the silk blouse underneath lay perfectly against my skin, accentuating the curves I knew were on full display through the fabric. 🖤👙 My skirt was tailored to perfection, hugging my hips while hiding the secrets of what lay beneath. 🤫

"You're staring," I said, my voice low and dripping with a challenge that only a few students seemed to understand.

The man across the aisle, usually quiet, had turned into a statue, his gaze locked on my chest as I turned to adjust my notes. I smiled, a predatory glint in my eyes. "I know you are, Liam. Does the view distract you from the lecture?" I leaned forward, my breasts pressing against the fabric, a subtle but undeniable movement. 🎯

"Yes," he admitted, his voice barely a whisper. "Always."

I chuckled, standing up to walk toward him. The skirt rose slightly with my movement, hinting at the tightness of the material against my skin. As I sat beside him, the fabric of my skirt brushed against his leg, sending a shiver through the air. The desk between us was a barrier, but my proximity erased it.

"Tonight, let's forget the syllabus," I whispered, leaning closer until my lips almost brushed his ear. "Let's focus on the real curriculum."

My hand drifted up his arm, fingers tracing the line of his muscle beneath the sleeve. I could feel the heat rising, a spark between us that threatened to ignite the whole room. 🔥🧠

I pulled the blazer open just a sliver more, revealing the lace trim beneath the blouse. It was risky, bold, and undeniably sexy. "Careful," I warned, watching his pupils dilate. "If the dean walks in, we might both get expelled. But if you're lucky... we might get noticed." 💋📸

The room seemed to fade, leaving only the two of us in this private dance of power and desire. I tilted my head, my dark hair cascading over one shoulder, exposing the smooth skin of my neck. "Ready?"

He nodded, trembling slightly.

"Good," I said, running a hand down my thigh, feeling the fabric slide against my skin. "Because the adventure has just begun." 🌊🏫

#UniversityTeacher
